hooks.command: LAST_CAL="c:/Projecten/AI Programming/ai-factory/.claude/last_calibration.txt"; NOW=$(date +%s); if [ ! -f "$LAST_CAL" ]; then echo '{"systemMessage": "WEEKLY CALIBRATION HAS NEVER RUN: Before any other work this session, switch to Athena (Reviewer) role and run the full cross-agent calibration protocol from agents/shared/prompts/calibration-prompt.md. This is mandatory."}'; elif [ $((NOW - $(cat "$LAST_CAL"))) -gt 604800 ]; then DAYS=$(( (NOW - $(cat "$LAST_CAL")) / 86400 )); echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"WEEKLY CALIBRATION OVERDUE (${DAYS} days since last run): Before any other work this session, switch to Athena (Reviewer) role and run the full cross-agent calibration protocol from agents/shared/prompts/calibration-prompt.md. This is mandatory.\"}"; fi

cd "c:/Projecten/AI Programming/ai-factory" && git diff --quiet HEAD -- agents/ projects/ shared/ config/ CLAUDE.md .gitignore .mcp.json .claude/last_calibration.txt 2>/dev/null; if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then git add agents/ projects/ shared/ config/ CLAUDE.md .gitignore .mcp.json .claude/last_calibration.txt && git commit -m "auto: session sync $(date +%Y-%m-%d)" && git push origin master; fi
